_comment: Quests that award passive skill points in Path of Exile 1. Steps are in order of completion.

quests.name: The Dweller of the Deep
steps: Talk to Nessa in Lioneye's Watch
Enter the Submerged Passage (bottom of The Flooded Depths)
Kill the Dweller of the Deep
Return to Nessa for your reward

quests.name: The Way Forward (Maerveth)
steps: Reach The Cavern of Wrath in Act 1
Kill Maerveth, Servant of Chaos
Return to Nessa

quests.name: The Caged Brute
steps: Enter the Prisoner's Gate
Descend through the Cells and Upper Prison
Kill Brutus, Lord Incarcerator in the Upper Prison
Return to Tarkleigh for your reward

quests.name: A Mercy of Nails
steps: Talk to Greust in the Forest Encampment
Find and kill Fidelitas, the Mourning in The Crossroads
Return to Greust

quests.name: Shadow of the Vaal
steps: Find the Ancient Pyramid in the Riverways
Explore the Ancient Pyramid
Kill Vaal Oversoul at the top of the Ancient Pyramid
Return to Helena for your reward

quests.name: Deal with the Bandits
quests.notes: Killing all three bandit lords awards 2 passive points. Helping a bandit lord awards 1 point and a stat bonus instead.
steps: Travel to The Crossroads
Find and kill Oak in The Western Forest (or help him)
Find and kill Kraityn in The Riverways (or help him)
Find and kill Alira in The Chamber of Sins Level 2 (or help her)
Return to Eramir in the Forest Encampment

quests.name: Sever the Right Hand
steps: Enter the Ebony Barracks
Kill General Gravicius in the Ebony Barracks
Return to Clarissa

quests.name: Fixture of Fate
steps: Collect all four Tomes in Act 3 library areas
Bring them to Siosa in The Library
Return to Siosa after he accepts the tomes

quests.name: Piety's Pets
steps: Enter the Sceptre of God
Ascend to the Upper Sceptre of God
Kill Piety
Return to Dialla

quests.name: Breaking Some Eggs
steps: Enter the Belly of the Beast Level 1
Find and kill Piety in the Belly of the Beast
Return to Oyun in Highgate

quests.name: An Indomitable Spirit
steps: Collect the four Virtue Gems in Act 4
Place them in the Altar of Sacrifice in The Harvest
Kill Malachai, The Nightmare
Return to Tasuni

quests.name: Death to Purity
steps: Enter the Cathedral Rooftop
Kill Avarius, Reassembled in the Cathedral Rooftop
Return to Lani

quests.name: Kitava, the Destroyer (Act 5)
quests.notes: Killing Kitava at the end of Act 5 removes 2 passive points permanently (mandatory penalty).
steps: Enter the Control Blocks
Descend to The Templar Courts
Kill High Templar Avarius to obtain the Kitava's Heart
Enter Kitava's Torments and defeat Kitava
This removes 2 passive points — this is unavoidable

quests.name: Fallen from Grace
steps: Enter The Twilight Strand in Act 6
Talk to Lilly Roth
Enter Lioneye's Watch (Act 6)
Kill Abberath, the Cloven One in The Mud Flats
Return to Lilly

quests.name: The Cloven One
steps: Collect Alira's Book, Oak's Book, and Kraityn's Book from The Mud Flats, The Riverways, and The Western Forest
Bring them to Eramir in The Forest Encampment (Act 6)
Return to Eramir

quests.name: A Sin's Heritage
steps: Find and kill Greust in The Vaal City (Act 7)
Enter the Ashen Fields
Kill Magebane in the Dread Thicket
Return to Sin

quests.name: Queen of Despair
steps: Enter the Chamber of Sins Level 1 (Act 7)
Descend to Chamber of Sins Level 2
Kill Maligaro, The Inquisitor
Return to Helena

quests.name: Essence of the Artist
steps: Obtain Clarissa's Map from The Sarn Encampment (Act 8)
Find the Aqueduct area
Kill Doedre, Darksoul in The Quay
Return to Clarissa

quests.name: Love is Dead
steps: Enter The Grain Gate (Act 8)
Kill Gravicius, Legatus Purus in the Grain Gate
Return to Clarissa

quests.name: Imperial Legacy
steps: Collect all four Tomes from Act 8 areas
Bring them to Siosa in The Library (Act 8)
Return to Siosa

quests.name: Master of a Million Faces
steps: Enter The Vastiri Desert (Act 9)
Find and kill Shakari in the Vastiri Desert
Return to Sin

quests.name: Fastis Mortem
steps: Enter The Quarry (Act 9)
Kill Garukhan, Queen of the Winds
Return to Irasha

quests.name: Vilenta's Vengeance
steps: Enter The Ravaged Square (Act 10)
Kill Vilenta in The Control Blocks
Return to Sin

quests.name: An End to Hunger (Act 10)
quests.notes: Killing Kitava at the end of Act 10 removes 4 more passive points permanently.
steps: Enter the Feeding Trough in Act 10
Descend to Kitava's Torments
Kill Kitava, the Destroyer
This removes 4 passive points — unavoidable
